Operation 'verifyauth' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is minimal and lacks clarity about what user information is returned and the authentication context. data.current_description: Verifies the validity of an API key and returns user information.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies the validity of the provided API key and returns authenticated user information. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns user details confirming successful authentication. Use this operation to validate API credentials before performing other operations.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks clarity about what user information is returned and the authentication context. Added details about bearer token requirement, return value specifics, and use case guidance for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'createmultipletransactions' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks critical details about inputs (array of transactions), outputs (transaction IDs, normalized data, duplicate results), and side effects (database persistence, duplicate prevention). Enhanced description provides AI agents with clear understanding of what to send, what to expect back, and how the operation affects system state.

data.current_description: Creates multiple transactions in a single request with AI-powered data normalization and advanced duplicate protection.
data.description_suggestion: Creates multiple transactions in a single request with AI-powered data normalization and advanced duplicate protection. Accepts an array of transaction objects in the request body. Returns creation results including transaction IDs, normalized data, and any duplicate detection outcomes. Transactions are persisted to the database and assigned to the authenticated user's account. Duplicate detection may prevent creation of flagged transactions.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks critical details about inputs (array of transactions), outputs (transaction IDs, normalized data, duplicate results), and side effects (database persistence, duplicate prevention). Enhanced description provides AI agents with clear understanding of what to send, what to expect back, and how the operation affects system state.

message: Operation 'getfolders' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Current description mentions Zapier dropdown format but lacks specifics about what data is returned (folder IDs, names, etc.) and the filtering behavior. Added clarity about return structure, access control filtering, and use case guidance to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves accessible folders for the authenticated user in Zapier dropdown format.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all accessible folders for the authenticated user, formatted for Zapier dropdown selection. Returns a list of folder objects containing folder identifiers and names. Results are filtered to show only folders the authenticated user has access to. Use this operation to populate folder selection options in workflows.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions Zapier dropdown format but lacks specifics about what data is returned (folder IDs, names, etc.) and the filtering behavior. Added clarity about return structure, access control filtering, and use case guidance to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.
